title: WORKSPACE versus bzlmod dependency management
description: Legacy WORKSPACE declares external repos imperatively, while bzlmod resolves a versioned module graph from MODULE.bazel.
body: Use when reading how a project pulls external code. Do not assume both systems can manage the same dependency cleanly at once. WORKSPACE runs repository rules top-to-bottom with no version resolution, so order and overrides matter; bzlmod declares modules with versions in MODULE.bazel and resolves a consistent set. Inspect which file owns a dependency. Validation signals include a reproducible external graph from a clean checkout. Risk boundary: straddling both systems for one dependency causes version skew, so migrate a dependency fully to bzlmod rather than splitting it.
